dsl_rule.translation_notes: Double Bottom pattern entry: close crosses above confirmation line (modeled as Donchian upper band tracking recent swing high between two bottoms). ADX > 25 confirms bullish trend strength. Exit uses Donchian lower band as support break. Pattern height calculation (adding to breakout price for target) is a position management rule, not a condition, so handled outside this rule structure. Success rate 78% in bull markets per Bulkowski study.

backtest_rule.reason: Double Bottom pattern entry: close crosses above confirmation line (modeled as Donchian upper band tracking recent swing high between two bottoms). ADX > 25 confirms bullish trend strength. Exit uses Donchian lower band as support break. source_rule_text: Double Bottom: Wait for price to close above the highest high between the two bottoms (confirmation) before entering the trade. Trade in bull market for better performance.
